display.purpose: Hero H1 only, one per page.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy, capped ~65ch, steps to Steel Gray for secondary text.

label.purpose: Badges and micro-labels, never uppercase-tracked eyebrows.

mono.purpose: Terminal output, migration commands, Discord slash-command chips.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting card, always paired with a 1px foreground/10 ring.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover/lift state on clickable cards, paired with -translate-y-1.

shadows.name: brand-button
shadows.purpose: Tinted shadow under the primary brand button, not neutral.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for reveals, hovers, nav underline, header scroll state.

motion.name: reveal-translate
motion.purpose: Vertical rise distance on scroll reveal.

motion.name: reveal-blur
motion.purpose: Pre-reveal blur, resolves to 0 on entry.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Header border/shadow on scroll, nav underline scale-in.

components.name: Primary Brand Button
components.description: Main CTA — download, primary conversion actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-brand"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>Download latest release</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.875rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: none; background: oklch(0.58 0.235 277); color: oklch(0.985 0.002 197.1); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(0.58 0.235 277 / 0.3); transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-brand:hover { background: oklch(0.53 0.22 277); } .ds-btn-brand:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.58 0.235 277 / 0.4); } .ds-btn-brand:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA — GitHub, Discord, alternate actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 0.875rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0.005 214.3); background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.05); transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.963 0.002 197.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.5); }

components.name: Brand Badge
components.description: Section eyebrow-free labels and status tags, e.g. "Discord Integration".
components.css: .ds-badge-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; height: 1.25rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 1.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.58 0.235 277 / 0.3); background: oklch(0.58 0.235 277 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.58 0.235 277); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Bordered, ring-defined card used for feature grids and content blocks.
components.html:
Web Panel

A real-time control room for your server.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.06), 0 1px 1px 0 oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.04); outline: 1px solid oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8 / 0.1); outline-offset: -1px; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px -2px oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.06); } .ds-card-icon { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(0.58 0.235 277 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.58 0.235 277); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-geist, Inter), Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.022em; color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); margin: 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.496 0.016 213.5); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Email capture / form field, e.g. the notify-me input.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 2.75rem; width: 100%; padding: 0 1rem; border-radius: 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.925 0.005 214.3); background: oklch(1 0 0); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 oklch(0.21 0.02 230 / 0.05); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.496 0.016 213.5 / 0.7); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.723 0.014 214.4 / 0.4); }

components.name: Nav Link (active underline)
components.description: Primary header nav link with the violet scale-in underline for the active section.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.496 0.016 213.5); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0.75rem; right: 0.75rem; bottom: -1px; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.58 0.235 277); transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: oklch(0.148 0.004 228.8); } .ds-nav-link-active::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.overview: sxPanel's site is styled like the instrument panel it's selling: a near-monochrome, cool-neutral canvas with a single violet signal color reserved for things that matter — the primary action, the active nav item, a live-status dot. Nothing about the palette or type system asks to be noticed for its own sake; it earns trust the way a well-built dashboard does, by being legible, precise, and quiet everywhere the content isn't the point. Headings run in Geist (a geometric, slightly technical grotesque) at tight negative tracking, standing in deliberate contrast to Inter's warmer, more readable body text — the same two-voice pairing a real product's UI and marketing site would share, because sxPanel's UI and marketing site do share it. This system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS-template look: no cream or sand backgrounds, no decorative glassmorphism, no eyebrow labels stacked above every section, no hero-metric-card cliché.
keyCharacteristics: Violet is a signal, not a surface — used on <10% of any given viewport
Cool, low-chroma neutrals throughout; no warm cream/sand tint
Geist for headings and numerals, Inter for body copy — contrast by family, not by weight alone
Shadows are soft, cool-toned, and always paired with a hairline ring, never used alone
Motion is a 700ms fade-and-rise on scroll entry, respecting prefers-reduced-motion

rules.name: The Rare Violet Rule
rules.body: Control Violet marks the thing the visitor should act on — never the surface they're reading. If violet is filling more than a button, a chip, an underline, or a soft background glow, it's being overused.

rules.name: The Cool-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral in this system carries a faint cool (blue-gray) tint, never a warm cream/sand tint. Don't introduce warm neutrals to "soften" the palette.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Geist for structure and numerals, Inter for prose. Never introduce a third display face; contrast comes from the Geist/Inter pairing, not from adding more families.

rules.name: The Tabular-Nums Rule
rules.body: Any numeral standing alone as a stat uses tabular-nums so digits don't shift width on update — these numbers read as live telemetry, not static copy.

rules.name: The Ring-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: A resting card's edge is defined by its 1px ring, not its shadow. If a component needs a shadow to read as "a card" with no ring, it's missing its structural border.

dos: Do keep Control Violet to buttons, active states, icon chips, and low-opacity background glows
Do use cool-tinted neutrals for every gray in the system; never introduce a warm/cream neutral
Do pair a hairline ring with every card shadow; never ship a shadow-only card
Do use Geist for anything structural and Inter for anything read at paragraph length
Do show real panel mockups, real Discord embed replicas, and real command names/numbers as proof
Do give every scroll-reveal animation a prefers-reduced-motion fallback
donts: Don't use the generic SaaS-template look: cream/sand backgrounds, decorative glassmorphism, eyebrows above every section, hero-metric-card template, or numbered 01/02/03 scaffolding
Don't use background-clip: text gradient text for emphasis
Don't use border-left/border-right accent stripes on cards or list items
Don't drop body or muted text lighter than Steel Gray — it's the contrast floor
Don't fill a badge solid with Control Violet and white text; badges stay at 10% fill
Don't fabricate proof (testimonials, server counts, logos) to fill the credibility gap
